metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace. Multi-agent orchestration, cognitive amplification, OpenTelemetry docs, .NET build enforcement, design intelligence, code elegance pipeline, code simplification, smart auto-continuation, and leaderless agent swarms.

plugins.name: metacognitive-guard
plugins.description: Cognitive amplification stack: epistemic hooks, competitive review, commit integrity checks, CI verification scripts, and deep-thinking agents.

plugins.name: dotnet-architecture-lint
plugins.description: Enforces .NET build patterns: Version.props symlinks, CPM, and single-owner imports. Prevents AI agents from breaking centralized version management.

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: User-configurable hooks from .local.md files. Define warn, block, and execute rules for Bash commands, file edits, and session events. Fork with global rules support ($HOME/.claude/global-rules/).

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Guided feature development with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, code review, and quality assurance.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Five-agent council using Teams API: Opus captain orchestrates, researcher + synthesizer cross-pollinate via SendMessage, clarity asks live follow-ups, Haiku janitor flags bloat. Reactive collaboration instead of fire-and-forget subagents.

plugins.name: exodia
plugins.description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration (9 commands + 2 skills: eight-gates, hades): fix, turbo-fix, fix-pipeline, tournament, mega-swarm, deep-think, batch-implement, red-blue-review, baryon-mode. Hades, eight-gates, and red-blue-review use Teams API for reactive collaboration.

plugins.name: design-studio
plugins.description: Design intelligence studio: creative direction + data-driven recommendations. 50 styles, 97 palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, 25 chart types, 13 stacks. BM25 search engine with design system generator.

plugins.name: elegance-pipeline
plugins.description: Multi-agent code-elegance workflow: 4 scouts (sonnet-4-6, research-only), 2 judges (opus), 1 planner, 1 verifier, 1 gated implementer. Persistent state with stage gates.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Code simplification agent tuned to qyl engineering principles. Measures elegance as problem-complexity / solution-complexity. Zero suppression, compile-time over runtime, less code is better code.

plugins.name: ancplua
plugins.description: Agent operating system — leaderless swarms with Playwright oracle. Code is opaque weights; correctness inferred exclusively from externally observable behavior.

plugins.name: marketplace-tour
plugins.description: Interactive live demos of all marketplace plugins + deterministic capability-snapshot skill that reads CLAUDE.md truth files instead of stale marketplace.json descriptions.

plugins.name: otelhook
plugins.description: SessionStart hook injecting OTel GenAI + MCP semantic conventions (v1.40.0) as passive context. Source: YAML registry.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude Code skills.
